name: Peraglees - The Ooloufian Resistance
short_description: Lock and load. Shoot first, ask questions if you feel like it. Every second counts as you dodge incoming fire, obliterate enemy fleets, and collect power-ups. It’s up to you to take the fight to the enemy, and save the Fennyverse from total annihilation.
detailed_description:
Join KAOTIX Fury, his brother Slade, and their two bow-wow companions on a thrilling mission to save the Fennyverse! Dive into a heart-pounding arcade shooter solo or couch co-op, packed with intense battles and unforgettable moments.

  • A faithful arcade style game with 16 bit graphics and gameplay.

  • Steam Deck support.

  • XINPUT Support up to two control pads.

  • Keyboard controls. (One player can only use the keyboard)

  • Incredible pixel art from David Jones & Elizabeth Wright.

  • FM chiptune soundtrack by Glyn Humphreys & Diives, using a software based solution of the YM2612 and the SN76489!

  • Multiple graphics options such as the CRT shader.

  • Colour blind friendly options.

  • 60 and 120fps mode for smoother gameplay.

  • Disable and enable 2-Player anywhere during gameplay.

  • Helper buddy system. Keeps multiplayer going instead of ending the players game.

  • Multiple camera options for 1-Player mode.

  • Streamer friendly moveable HUD.

  • Lot's of sound options.

  • Four difficulty levels.

  • 9 unique areas to traverse.

  • 18 different enemies types to tackle.

  • 11 bosses to destroy.

  • An arsenal of 9 weapons to master along with the Mega Bomb, Mines and Melee Roll.

  • Upgrade weapons and speed and compete with the hardest enemies.

  • 7 vehicles to control and add to the destruction.

  • Play solo or local co-op with a friend, play online with a friend with Steam Remote Play Together.

  • Unlock 18 Cheats in the cheat shop.

  • Original Mode! with an additional 45 levels. Each planet will have 3 quests to complete, a mini boss and a big boss.

  • Crisis Mode! Battle in arena based levels, find your friends to help you battle in Original mode!

  • Survival Mode! Battle waves of enemies in a Vampire Survivors like gameplay style.

  • Boss Rush! Battle all bosses in a row and try to to get to the end with one life.

  • Extras shop with loads of fun unlockables.
